================================================================================
SECTION 2: MODEL DETAILS
================================================================================

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: PLD
  Organization: NVIDIA GEAR Lab
  Date: 2025-10-30
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.00091
  Code: None
  Venue: ReALM-GEN Workshop @ ICLR 2026
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: plug-and-play residual RL framework (probe → learn → distill back to generalist)
    Backbone: varies (wraps existing VLAs)
    LLM: varies (wraps existing VLAs)
    Parameters: varies (applied on top of existing VLAs)
  Tags: residual-RL, probe-learn-distill, post-training, ICLR-2026-workshop
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=99.0): libero_avg=99.0
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'RL post-trained', 'simpler_env': 'RL post-trained'}
  AI Review Summary: Probe-Learn-Distill (PLD) 3단계 프레임워크로, residual RL로 VLA의 실패 영역을 탐색(probe)하고, hybrid rollout으로 데이터를 수집(learn)하며, 이를 다시 supervised FT로 정제(distill)하여 LIBERO 99% 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: SimpleVLA-RL
  Organization: Shanghai Jiao Tong University / Peking University / Shanghai AI Lab / HKU
  Date: 2025-09-11
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.09674
  Code: https://github.com/PRIME-RL/SimpleVLA-RL
  Venue: ICLR 2026
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive + GRPO reinforcement learning
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Inference: 10 Hz
  Tags: 7B, RL, GRPO, reinforcement-learning, ICLR-2026, open-source, SOTA, data-efficient
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=98.83): libero_spatial=99.1, libero_object=99.2, libero_goal=98.5, libero_long=98.5
    robotwin_v1 (avg=70.4): hammer_beat=92.6, block_handover=89.6, blocks_stack=40.2, shoe_place=59.3, average=70.4
    robotwin_v2 (avg=68.8): short_horizon=64.9, medium_horizon=72.5, long_horizon=69.0, average=68.8
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'RL fine-tuned (on top of SFT)', 'robotwin_v1': 'RL fine-tuned', 'robotwin_v2': 'RL fine-tuned'}
  Peer Review:
    Venue: ICLR 2026, Decision: poster
    Review Avg: 7.5, Confidence: 4.25

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: DualCoT-VLA
  Organization: HKUST (Guangzhou) / Huawei Foundation Model Department
  Date: 2026-03-23
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22280
  Code: https://livfour.github.io/DualCoT-VLA/
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Diffusion Transformer (DiT) action expert trained with Flow Matching, conditioned on VLM hidden states (including 16 visual CoT and 4 linguistic CoT learnable query tokens) via cross-attention.
    Backbone: Qwen3-VL-4B (with Depth Anything 3 as frozen visual teacher during training)
    LLM: Qwen3-VL-4B (Qwen3-0.6B as frozen auxiliary linguistic teacher during training)
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: flow-matching, chain-of-thought, dual-cot, libero, robocasa, parallel-reasoning, latent-reasoning
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=98.8): libero_spatial=99.4, libero_object=99.8, libero_goal=97.8, libero_long=98.2, libero_avg=98.8
    robocasa (avg=55.1): robocasa_gr1_avg=55.1
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'robocasa': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 16개의 visual CoT + 4개의 linguistic CoT learnable query token을 VLM 입력에 삽입하고 각각을 Depth Anything 3(기하)와 Qwen3-0.6B(언어)로 distill하여, autoregressive CoT 없이 단일 forward pass로 dual-modal 추론을 수행. LIBERO 98.8%, RoboCasa GR1 55.1%, VLM latency 3156ms → 58.1ms.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: SnapFlow
  Organization: Jilin University / Chongqing University / University of Liverpool / GenY
  Date: 2026-04-07
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05656
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Flow-matching action expert distilled to a single forward pass (1-NFE) via progressive FM/consistency mixing using a two-step Euler shortcut target and a zero-initialized target-time MLP embedding that lets the network switch between local velocity estimation (s = t) and global one-step generation (s = 0)
    Backbone: Applied to pi0.5 (3B, PaliGemma backbone, cross-attention action expert) and SmolVLA (~500M, SmolVLM backbone, concatenation-based action expert); VLM backbone frozen; only action expert (~300M for pi0.5) and target-time MLP trained
    LLM: PaliGemma (Gemma) for pi0.5; SmolVLM for SmolVLA
    Parameters: 3B (pi0.5) and 500M (SmolVLA)
  Tags: flow-matching, distillation, consistency-models, inference-acceleration, one-step, libero, pi0.5, smolvla
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=98.75): libero_spatial=99.0, libero_object=100.0, libero_goal=99.0, libero_long=97.0, libero_avg=98.75
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned (pi0.5 backbone + SnapFlow self-distillation, 1-NFE inference)'}
  AI Review Summary: pi0.5(3B)와 SmolVLA(500M) 같은 flow-matching VLA의 10-step Euler denoising을 "FM sample + two-step Euler shortcut consistency sample" progressive mixing과 zero-initialized target-time embedding으로 **1-NFE forward pass**에 압축하는 plug-and-play self-distillation. pi0.5 LIBERO 평균 98.75%(10-step teacher 97.75% 대비
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: DiT4DiT
  Organization: Mondo Robotics; HKUST(GZ); HKUST
  Date: 2026-03-11
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.10448
  Code: https://dit4dit.github.io/
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Action Diffusion Transformer adapted from GR00T-N1, using AdaLN to inject diffusion timestep and cross-attention to consume intermediate hidden features extracted from the video DiT at a fixed feature-extraction timestep; trained with flow matching
    Backbone: Cosmos-Predict2.5-2B video Diffusion Transformer (with causal video VAE), conditioned on Cosmos-Reason1 language embeddings
    LLM: Cosmos-Reason1 (text encoder for video DiT)
    Parameters: 2.2B trainable
  Tags: flow_matching, video_generation, diffusion_transformer, libero, robocasa, world_model, dual_dit
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=98.55): libero_spatial=98.4, libero_object=99.6, libero_goal=98.6, libero_long=97.6, libero_avg=98.6
    robocasa (avg=50.8): robocasa_gr1_avg=50.8
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'trained from scratch (no external action pretraining data)', 'robocasa': 'trained from scratch'}
  AI Review Summary: Video DiT (Cosmos-2B 초기화)와 Action DiT (GR00T-N1 기반)를 cascaded coupling하되, **single forward pass의 intermediate feature를 추출**하여 video reconstruction을 bypass, LIBERO **98.6%** SOTA + RoboCasa 50.8% + 7x 빠른 수렴 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: LaMP
  Organization: Shanghai Jiao Tong University, Southeast University, Shanghai Innovation Institute
  Date: 2026-03-26
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.25399
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: flow matching Action Expert with single-layer gated cross-attention motion guidance
    Backbone: Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct (frozen)
    LLM: Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct
    Parameters: None
  Tags: flow-matching, 3d-flow, motion-prior, dual-expert, libero, simpler_env
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=98.33): libero_spatial=99.4, libero_object=99.8, libero_goal=97.4, libero_long=96.7, libero_avg=98.3
    simpler_env: simpler_widowx_stack=75.0, simpler_widowx_carrot=66.7, simpler_widowx_spoon=79.1, simpler_widowx_eggplant=95.8, simpler_avg=79.2
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'simpler_env': 'zero-shot'}
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Venue: None

    Backbone: Inherits base VLA (Gemma vision-language backbone of Pi0/Pi0.5)
    LLM: Gemma (via Pi0/Pi0.5)
    Parameters: None
  Tags: test-time-guidance, classifier-free-guidance, pi0.5-base, libero, inference-time, robustness
  Benchmarks:

  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: Pi0/Pi0.5 위에 "foreground-erased counterfactual observation"을 unconditional branch로 두고 **classifier-free guidance 스타일로 predicted velocity field를 residual extrapolation**하는 inference-time guidance. 학습은 counterfactual calibration(p_cf=0.1) 30K step만 필요하며 LIBERO Avg 97.9%(π0.5 baseline 95.2 대비 **+2.7%p*
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Code: None

    Backbone: None
    LLM: None
    Parameters: N/A (framework, not a model)
  Tags: token-pruning, training-free, efficiency, speedup, multi-VLA, libero
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.8): libero_spatial=97.6, libero_object=99.6, libero_goal=98.4, libero_long=95.6
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned (OpenVLA-OFT base)'}
  AI Review Summary: Geometric prior (Sobel edge) + semantic prior (cross-modal attention) + motion prior (temporal difference)를 결합한 training-free token pruning으로, OpenVLA-OFT에서 LIBERO **97.8%** (baseline 97.1%) at **1.25× speedup**, 최대 **1.54× at 30% retention**.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: DepthCache
  Organization: Huazhong University of Science and Technology
  Date: 2026-03-11
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.10469
  Code: None
  Venue: Submitted to IEEE (per author note)
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Training-free inference-time visual token merging wrapper; does not modify the underlying VLA action head (e.g., flow-matching for pi0.5, autoregressive for OpenVLA, Diffusion Transformer for GR00T)
    Backbone: N/A (training-free wrapper; inherits backbone of host VLA, e.g., SigLIP for pi0.5, SigLIP+DINOv2 for OpenVLA, Eagle for GR00T)
    LLM: N/A (inherits LLM of host VLA, e.g., Gemma for pi0.5, Llama 2 for OpenVLA)
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: training_free, token_merging, inference_acceleration, depth_guided, libero, wrapper
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.6): libero_spatial=98.9, libero_object=97.1, libero_goal=98.3, libero_long=96.1, libero_avg=97.6
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned (host pi0.5 fine-tuned on LIBERO; DepthCache applied at inference only)'}
  AI Review Summary: Depth 기반 영역 분할 + progressive cross-frame token merging + dual protection mechanism으로, **3개 VLA (π0.5, OpenVLA, GR00T)에서 training-free로 1.07-1.33x speedup과 0.2-1.0%p 이내 성능 하락** 달성. Real-world에서 191ms→143ms (1.33x).
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: OmniVLA-RL
  Organization: Country Garden Services / Omni AI / VBot / East China Normal University
  Date: 2026-04-20
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17706
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Conditional Flow Matching with action chunking (H=16, K=10 denoising steps). Mix-of-Transformers backbone shares Spatial / Reasoning / Action experts under Block-wise Causal Attention. RL-tuned with Flow-GSPO (SDE reformulation via Fokker-Planck + Group Segmented PO; G=8 group size, β=0.01 KL).
    Backbone: SigLIP (semantic) + VGGT (Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer, spatial)
    LLM: PaLiGemma (decoder-only Transformer; weights pretrained)
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: RL, online-RL, flow-matching, mixture-of-experts, spatial-understanding, libero
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.6): libero_spatial=99.2, libero_object=99.2, libero_goal=98.5, libero_long=93.5
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'SFT + online RL (Flow-GSPO) fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: Reasoning/spatial/action 전문가를 Mix-of-Transformers로 통합하고, flow matching을 SDE로 재정식화한 Flow-GSPO를 GSPO와 결합하여 VLA의 공간 이해와 online RL 안정성을 동시에 끌어올리려는 시도.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: AnchorRefine
  Organization: Beijing University of Technology; Beihang University; Nanjing University of Science and Technology
  Date: 2026-04-20
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17787
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Hierarchical two-branch decoder: a Trajectory Anchor Planner predicts a coarse arm-action scaffold and a Residual Refine Module predicts a residual correction in an anchor-relative space; a decision-aware MSE-based gripper refinement branch corrects boundary-sensitive gripper decisions
    Backbone: Inherited from base policy (GR-1 or X-VLA)
    LLM: Inherited from base policy
    Parameters: 0.22B (GR-1 backbone) / 1.1B (X-VLA backbone)
  Tags: hierarchical, residual_refinement, libero, calvin, real_robot, anchor_refine
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=97.4): libero_long=97.4, libero_avg=97.4
    calvin (avg=4.4): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=4.4
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 사람의 coarse-to-fine reaching에서 착안해 VLA action 생성을 "trajectory anchor + residual refinement"로 분해하고, gripper를 decision-aware MSE로 별도 보정하여 LIBERO-Long 97.4%, CALVIN ABC→D Avg.Len 4.40을 달성한 backbone-agnostic framework.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Organization: PKU / Shanghai AI Lab
  Date: 2025-08-27
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.20072
  Code: https://github.com/Liang-ZX/DiscreteDiffusionVLA
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True

    Action Head: discrete diffusion over tokenized action chunks with adaptive decoding order
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, discrete-diffusion, adaptive-decoding, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=96.3): libero_avg=96.3
    simpler_env: simpler_fractal=71.2, simpler_bridge=54.2
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenVLA의 Prismatic-7B backbone 내에서 **bidirectional discrete diffusion**을 구현하여, autoregressive 대비 2x 빠른 추론(68.8ms vs 136.2ms)과 LIBERO 96.3%, SimplerEnv-Fractal 64.1%를 달성하며, 적응적 디코딩 순서와 secondary re-masking으로 오류 교정 지원.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: pi*0.6
  Organization: Physical Intelligence
  Date: 2025-11-18
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.14759
  Code: https://github.com/Physical-Intelligence/openpi
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: flow matching + RL (RECAP)
    Backbone: Gemma 3 4B VLM
    LLM: Gemma 3 4B
    Parameters: ~5B (4B VLM + ~860M action expert)
  Tags: 5B, flow-matching, RL, RECAP, real-world, manipulation, open-source, cross-embodiment
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=93.1): libero_spatial=96.4, libero_object=97.2, libero_goal=95.6, libero_long=83.2
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: RECAP (RL with Experience and Corrections via Advantage-conditioned Policies)을 통해 VLA가 실제 배포 경험에서 자기개선하여, 태스크 throughput 2배 이상 증가 및 실패율 절반 감소 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

MODEL: LingBot-VLA
  Organization: Ant Group / Robbyant
  Date: 2026-01-26
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.18692
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Mixture of Transformers + flow matching
    Backbone: Qwen2.5-VL-3B
    LLM: Qwen2.5 3B
    Parameters: ~4B (3B VLM + action expert)
  Tags: 3B, MoT, flow-matching, large-scale-data, open-source, multi-embodiment
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=92.55): libero_spatial=97.4, libero_object=98.0, libero_goal=94.2, libero_long=80.6
    calvin (avg=4.5): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=4.5
    robotwin_v1 (avg=61.5): robotwin_easy=74.2, robotwin_hard=48.8
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned', 'robotwin_v1': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 9개 인기 양팔 로봇 구성에서 약 20,000시간의 실제 데이터를 수집하여 학습한 실용적 VLA foundation model로, 효율적 학습과 폭넓은 일반화를 목표.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: UD-VLA
  Organization: Tsinghua University / Shanghai AI Lab
  Date: 2025-11-03
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.01718
  Code: None
  Venue: ICLR 2026
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: joint discrete denoising diffusion (JD3P)
    Backbone: Emu3 + MOVQ visual tokenizer
    LLM: Emu3
    Parameters: 3B
  Tags: 3B, diffusion, unified-denoising, fast-inference, manipulation
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=91.75): libero_spatial=97.2, libero_object=97.8, libero_goal=93.6, libero_long=78.4
    calvin (avg=4.5): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=4.5
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 다중 modality(language reasoning + action)를 단일 이산 denoising diffusion trajectory에서 jointly 생성하는 통합 프레임워크로, CALVIN·LIBERO·SimplerEnv에서 SOTA 달성과 autoregressive 대비 4x 빠른 추론.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: ECoT
  Organization: UC Berkeley / Stanford / University of Warsaw
  Date: 2024-07-11
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08693
  Code: https://github.com/MichalZawalski/embodied-CoT
  Venue: CoRL 2024
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive (OpenVLA base) + structured reasoning chain (TASK/PLAN/SUBTASK/MOVE)
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, chain-of-thought, embodied-reasoning, autoregressive, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=90.8): libero_avg=90.8
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned with CoT reasoning'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenVLA-7B에 6단계 embodied CoT (task rephrase→plan→subtask→move→gripper→objects)를 추가하여, Bridge V2에서 **Octo 대비 +45%p, OpenVLA 대비 +22%p** (ID 66%), Gemini 1.0으로 reasoning chain 자동 생성, 비동기 실행으로 +40% 추론 가속.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: FLARE
  Organization: NVIDIA
  Date: 2025-05-21
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.15659
  Code: None
  Venue: CoRL 2025
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Diffusion Transformer (DiT) + Q-former + future latent alignment
    Backbone: SigLIP2-Large (siglip2-large-patch16-256)
    LLM: None
    Parameters: 3B
  Tags: 3B, diffusion-transformer, world-model, future-alignment, manipulation
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=89.2): libero_spatial=95.8, libero_object=96.4, libero_goal=91.4, libero_long=73.2
    calvin (avg=4.1): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=4.1
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: DiT에 M=32 learnable future token을 추가하고, SigLIP-2 기반 action-aware embedding의 cosine alignment loss로 latent world modeling을 수행하여, RoboCasa 24-task에서 **70.1%** (baseline 61.9%, +8.2%p), GR1 24-task에서 **55.0%** (+11%p), 추론 overhead **zero**.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Date: 2026-03-18
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.17850
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False

MODEL: DexVLA

  Date: 2025-02-03
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.05855
  Code: None
  Venue: CoRL 2025
  Open Source: False

    Backbone: Qwen2-VL-2B
    LLM: Qwen2 ~1.5B (via Qwen2-VL-2B)

  Tags: 3B, diffusion, hierarchical, dexterous, manipulation
  Benchmarks:

    calvin (avg=4.0): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=4.0
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: Qwen2-VL 2B에 **1B 파라미터 diffusion expert** (32-layer transformer)를 plug-in하고, 3-stage curriculum (cross-embodiment→embodiment-specific→task-specific)으로 학습하여, 셔츠 접기 0.92, LIBERO 97.3%, **60Hz inference on A6000** 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: OpenVLA-OFT
  Organization: Stanford / UC Berkeley / TRI
  Date: 2025-02-27
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.19645
  Code: https://github.com/moojink/openvla-oft
  Venue: RSS 2025
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: parallel decoding + continuous actions
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, parallel-decoding, LoRA, manipulation, open-source
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=87.35): libero_spatial=94.8, libero_object=95.2, libero_goal=91.0, libero_long=68.4
    simpler_env: google_robot_pick_coke_can=82.0, google_robot_move_near=68.5
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned (LoRA)', 'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned (LoRA)'}
  AI Review Summary: VLA fine-tuning의 3대 설계 선택 (parallel decoding + L1 regression + action chunking)을 체계적으로 분석하여, OpenVLA에서 LIBERO **76.5%→97.1%** (+20.6%p), **26x throughput** (LIBERO 8-step chunk), **43x** (ALOHA 25-step), real bimanual에서 기존 대비 **+15%p** 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: RoboAlign
  Organization: KAIST / RLWRLD / Yonsei University / UC Berkeley
  Date: 2026-03-22
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21341
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Diffusion-based action expert (newly initialized) attached to a frozen MLLM backbone; trained on top of an MLLM that has been aligned with low-level FAST action tokens via SFT followed by GRPO reinforcement learning that rewards format and FAST token accuracy
    Backbone: Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct MLLM backbone (also evaluated with Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct); newly-initialized diffusion-based action expert reads hidden states from the 18th layer of the frozen MLLM
    LLM: Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct
    Parameters: 7B (MLLM) + diffusion action head
  Tags: reasoning, GRPO, reinforcement-learning, FAST-tokens, diffusion-head, libero, calvin, qwen2.5-vl
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=86.75): libero_spatial=93.8, libero_object=96.0, libero_goal=87.2, libero_long=70.0, libero_avg=86.8
    calvin (avg=2.57): calvin_abc_d_1=87.6, calvin_abc_d_2=67.2, calvin_abc_d_3=47.1, calvin_abc_d_4=32.8, calvin_abc_d_5=22.2, calvin_abc_d_avg_len=2.57
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned (frozen MLLM backbone, diffusion head trained per benchmark)', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned ABC->D (frozen MLLM backbone, diffusion head trained per benchmark)'}
  AI Review Summary: Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct를 SFT로 FAST action token 생성 능력에 노출시킨 뒤 GRPO로 reasoning을 action-accuracy reward에 직접 맞추는 2-stage MLLM 학습으로, 이후 frozen MLLM 위에 diffusion head를 붙여 LIBERO Avg 86.8%, CALVIN ABC→D Avg.Len 2.57, real-world +106.6% 상대 이득을 달성한 KAIST/RLWRLD/Yonsei/UC Berkeley의 language-action alignment f
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: CoT-VLA
  Organization: UC Berkeley
  Date: 2025-03-27
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.22020
  Code: None
  Venue: CVPR 2025
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive (256-bin discretized, 7 tokens × 10-step chunks via VILA-U)
    Backbone: SigLIP (via VILA-U)
    LLM: LLaMA-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, chain-of-thought, diffusion, reasoning, manipulation
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=86.32): libero_spatial=92.1, libero_object=93.8, libero_goal=88.2, libero_long=71.2
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: VILA-U 기반 7B VLA에 시각적 CoT(미래 subgoal image 예측)를 autoregressive하게 통합하고, hybrid attention + action chunking으로 LIBERO 81.1%, real-world 17% 향상 달성. 단, 이미지 생성으로 **7배 추론 slowdown**.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: pi0-FAST
  Organization: Physical Intelligence
  Date: 2025-01-23
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.09747
  Code: https://github.com/physical-intelligence/fast
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: FAST tokenizer (discrete tokens from continuous actions)
    Backbone: PaliGemma-based VLM
    LLM: Gemma-based
    Parameters: 3B
  Inference: 230 Hz
  Tags: 3B, autoregressive, FAST-tokenizer, manipulation, hybrid
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=86.1): libero_spatial=93.8, libero_object=95.4, libero_goal=88.0, libero_long=67.2
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: Discrete cosine transform 기반 주파수 공간 action tokenization (FAST)을 제안하여, 기존 binning 대비 고주파 dexterous 태스크에서의 정확도를 크게 향상시키고 학습 시간을 최대 5배 단축.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

  Organization: Microsoft Research / Tsinghua University
  Date: 2024-11-29
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.19650
  Code: https://github.com/microsoft/CogACT
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: diffusion (continuous action generation)
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B
  Tags: 7B, diffusion, manipulation, open-source, VLM-backbone
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=85.9): libero_spatial=93.6, libero_object=94.8, libero_goal=88.4, libero_long=66.8

  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'simpler_env': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: DINOv2+SigLIP vision encoder와 LLaMA-2 backbone으로 "cognition feature"를 추출하고, 별도의 Diffusion Transformer (DiT) action module로 action을 생성하는 componentized VLA로, OpenVLA 대비 +35%p (sim), +59%p (real) 향상을 7.6B로 달성하고 action head scaling law를 실증.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: ProgressVLA
  Organization: Peking University / Microsoft Research Asia
  Date: 2026-03-29
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27670
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Diffusion-based Latent Action Expert producing latent action chunks, decoded by an Action Decoder; classifier guidance steers diffusion via gradients backpropagated from a progress estimator through an inverse-dynamics world model
    Backbone: DINOv2 patch features for progress estimator; UniVLA world model architecture; Latent Action Expert with DiTA-style causal Transformer
    LLM: None
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: diffusion, classifier-guidance, world-model, progress-estimation, libero, calvin, latent-action
  Benchmarks:

MODEL: RoboVLM
  Organization: Tsinghua University / ByteDance Research / CASIA / SJTU / NUS
  Date: 2024-12-18
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.14058
  Code: https://github.com/Robot-VLM/RoboVLM
  Venue: ICLR 2025
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: latent action tokenization (VQ-VAE) + autoregressive
    Backbone: KosMos VLM (best config; framework supports 8 VLM backbones)
    LLM: KosMos 2B (best config)
    Parameters: 2B
  Tags: 2B, VQ-VAE, autoregressive, manipulation, open-source, cross-embodiment
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=84.05): libero_spatial=91.8, libero_object=93.4, libero_goal=86.8, libero_long=64.2
    calvin (avg=3.5): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=3.5
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 8개 VLM backbone, 4개 policy architecture, 600+ 실험을 통해 VLA 설계의 핵심 요인을 체계적으로 분석하고, 이를 바탕으로 구축한 RoboVLMs가 manipulation 벤치마크에서 SOTA 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: RDT-1B
  Organization: Tsinghua University / Shanghai Qi Zhi Institute
  Date: 2024-10-10
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.07864
  Code: https://github.com/thu-ml/RoboticsDiffusionTransformer
  Venue: ICLR 2025
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: diffusion (scalable transformer)
    Backbone: SigLIP-So400m + T5-v1_1-XXL (language encoder)
    LLM: None
    Parameters: 1.2B
  Tags: 1.2B, diffusion, manipulation, open-source, foundation-model, bimanual
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=82.5): libero_spatial=90.2, libero_object=91.8, libero_goal=85.6, libero_long=62.4
    calvin (avg=3.4): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=3.4
    robotwin_v1 (avg=28.5): robotwin_easy=42.6, robotwin_hard=14.4
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned', 'calvin': 'fine-tuned', 'robotwin_v1': 'fine-tuned'}

  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: SmoothVLA
  Organization: Chongqing University of Posts and Telecommunications / Chinese Academy of Sciences / USTC
  Date: 2026-03-14
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13925
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive with action chunking + GRPO RL fine-tuning for smoothness
    Backbone: Prismatic-7B (OpenVLA base)
    LLM: Llama 2 7B
    Parameters: ~7B
  Tags: smoothness, GRPO, RL, OpenVLA-based, jerk-penalty, physics-informed, libero
  Benchmarks:
    libero (avg=80.5): libero_avg=80.5, libero_spatial_robustness_avg=54.1
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'rl'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenVLA에 physics-informed hybrid reward (binary task reward + jerk-based smoothness penalty, λ=0.2)를 적용한 GRPO RL로, 기존 RL 대비 **13.8% smoothness 향상** + LIBERO-Plus robustness **46.2%** (SFT 22.0% 대비 +24.2%p) 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  AI Review: PDF-verified

  AI Review: PDF-verified

  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: 3D Diffuser Actor

  Date: 2024-02-16
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.10885

  Venue: CoRL 2024
  Open Source: True

    Parameters: ~50M

  Eval Conditions: {'calvin': 'fine-tuned', 'rlbench': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: CLIP ResNet50로 추출한 2D feature를 depth로 3D로 lifting하고, 3D relative position attention을 가진 denoising transformer로 keypose를 생성하여, RLBench multi-view에서 81.3% (+18.1%p SOTA), single-view 78.4% (+13.1%p), CALVIN 3.27 avg len 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: AnySlot
  Organization: Stony Brook University / Carnegie Mellon University / MBZUAI / Peking University
  Date: 2026-04-12
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10432
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: π0.5 flow-matching action expert, fully fine-tuned (not PEFT — PEFT variant scored ~7% avg SR), conditioned on a scene-marker visual goal overlay Ĩ produced by Nano-Banana 2. Action chunking H≥1.
    Backbone: PaliGemma-3B (multi-view images)
    LLM: PaliGemma-3B (VL backbone, π0.5 inheritance); Nano-Banana 2 as out-of-box high-level image-generator grounding module (11s latency on H200)
    Parameters: 3B
  Tags: slot-placement, goal-conditioned, zero-shot, hierarchical, flow-matching, manipulation, SlotBench
  AI Review Summary: 언어 지시를 **explicit visual goal (scene marker)** 로 먼저 변환한 뒤, goal-conditioned VLA policy로 실행하는 **hierarchical slot-level placement 프레임워크**. 새로운 SlotBench 9개 과제군에서 monolithic VLA 대비 zero-shot 성능 개선을 보고.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: DA-PTQ
  Organization: Tongji University / University of Technology Sydney
  Date: 2026-04-13
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11572
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Post-training quantization applied over an existing diffusion VLA (CogACT). Targets the MLP blocks within the Diffusion Transformer (DiT) action head; final 2 DiT blocks (closest to continuous output) are preserved at high precision. Top 30% drift-sensitive DiT layers retained at BF16, remaining 70% quantized to W4. Outputs 7-DoF (3D translation + 3D rotation + gripper) continuous control via the original CogACT diffusion denoiser.
    Backbone: inherited from base VLA (CogACT in paper experiments)
    LLM: inherited from CogACT
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: quantization, post-training, efficiency, deployment, mixed-precision, drift-aware, CogACT
  Benchmarks:
    simpler_env: widowx_vm_put_spoon=65.2, widowx_vm_put_carrot=52.2, widowx_vm_stack_blocks=17.4, widowx_vm_put_eggplant=60.9, google_vm_pick_coke=92.4, google_vm_move_near=87.9, google_vm_open_close_drawer=58.3, google_vm_drawer_apple=35.2, google_va_pick_coke=87.5, google_va_move_near=74.5, google_va_open_close_drawer=20.1, google_va_drawer_apple=24.7
  Eval Conditions: {'simpler_env': 'W4A8 quantized CogACT (drift-aware PTQ), zero-shot; 42.5% memory reduction, 54.8% speedup vs CogACT FP. WidowX-VM avg=48.9, Google-VM avg=68.5, Google-VA avg=51.7'}
  AI Review Summary: 순차 제어에서 **temporal error accumulation**으로 붕괴하는 VLA PTQ를, **Cross-Space Representation Compensation (CSRC) + Drift-Aware Mixed-Precision Allocation (DA-MPA)** 두 축으로 해결. CogACT W4A8에서 42.5% 메모리 감소 + 54.8% 속도 향상을 달성하면서 FP 대비 성능 손실을 최소화.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: DeeR-VLA
  Organization: Tsinghua University / Shanghai AI Lab
  Date: 2024-11-04
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.02359
  Code: https://github.com/yueyang130/DeeR-VLA
  Venue: NeurIPS 2024
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: multi-exit early-stopping with action consistency metric
    Backbone: OpenFlamingo
    LLM: MPT-1B
    Parameters: 3B
  Tags: 3B, dynamic-inference, early-exit, efficient, open-source
  Eval Conditions: {'calvin': 'fine-tuned (dynamic inference)'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenFlamingo (3B/9B) 기반 MLLM에 multi-exit 구조를 추가하여, action consistency 기반 early-exit으로 LLM GFLOPs를 **2.5-5.2x 절감** (Table 2: 31.2→10.0~12.5 GFLOPs, Table 5 best: 31.2→6.0), 실제 latency **68.1% 감소** (55→17.5ms)하면서 CALVIN 성능 유지(4.08 vs 4.07).
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: DIAL
  Organization: The University of Hong Kong; XPENG Robotics; University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
  Date: 2026-03-31
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.29844
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Lightweight 4-layer self-attention fuses current visual features with predicted latent foresight, then a 16-layer Diffusion Transformer (flow-matching) cross-attends to this conditioning to denoise an action chunk (horizon H=16)
    Backbone: Pretrained ViT (shared from Qwen2.5-VL)
    LLM: Qwen2.5-VL-3B
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: flow_matching, dual_system, world_modeling, robocasa, latent_intent, qwen2.5_vl
  Benchmarks:
    robocasa (avg=70.2): robocasa_gr1_avg=70.2
  Eval Conditions: {'robocasa': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: VLM(System-2)이 **자신의 ViT feature space 안에서** H-step 뒤의 visual foresight를 예측하고, flow-matching policy(System-1)가 latent inverse dynamics로 이를 풀어 action을 생성하는 differentiable bottleneck 구조. RoboCasa GR1 Tabletop 24-task 평균 **70.2%** (full data)로 FLARE 55.0%, GR00T-N1.6 47.6% 대비 큰 격차로 SOTA; few-shot(10%) 
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Date: 2024-12-04

  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:

    Backbone: SigLIP
    LLM: Qwen2
    Parameters: 2B–72B (multi-scale)
  Inference: 82 Hz
  Tags: 2B-72B, diffusion-action, autoregressive-reasoning, fast-inference, open-source

  Date: 2026-03-26

  Code: https://dmw-cvpr.github.io/
  Venue: CVPR 2026
  Open Source: True

    Action Head: Preference-aligned policy fine-tuning with RL-style reward shaping. Personalized user embedding conditions the policy; natural-language instructions provide short-term style guidance. Outputs continuous control (throttle / brake / steer) for autonomous driving.

  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:

    Backbone: PaliGemma (SigLIP + Gemma)
    LLM: Gemma (via PaliGemma)
    Parameters: None
  Tags: discrete-diffusion, continuized, fine-grained-control, manipulation

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: E-VLA
  Organization: Zhejiang University / Ant Group / Hunan University
  Date: 2026-04-06
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04834
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Lightweight transformer-based action expert from SmolVLA, with interleaved self-attention and cross-attention over fused visual tokens, predicting normalized action chunks (chunk size 40 at 30 Hz).
    Backbone: SigLIP (within SmolVLM), augmented with a 4-block weight-sharing ViT event adapter
    LLM: SmolVLM (within SmolVLA backbone)
    Parameters: ~0.5B
  Tags: event-camera, smolvla, low-light, motion-blur, real-world, sensor-fusion
  Eval Conditions: {'real_world': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: DAVIS346 event camera stream을 SmolVLA 기반 VLA에 파라미터 프리 overlay 또는 13M hierarchical event adapter로 주입하여, 20 lux 저조도에서 Pick-Place 성공률 0% → 90%, 1000ms motion blur에서 0% → 25%까지 robustness를 회복한 event-augmented VLA.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

MODEL: FLOWER
  Organization: Karlsruhe Institute of Technology (KIT)
  Date: 2025-09-05
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.04996
  Code: https://github.com/intuitive-robots/flower_vla_calvin
  Venue: CoRL 2025
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: flow matching
    Backbone: Florence-2-Large (encoder only)
    LLM: None
    Parameters: 950M
  Tags: 950M, flow-matching, efficient, manipulation, open-source
  AI Review Summary: VLM의 30-50% layer를 pruning하여 intermediate fusion하고, 18-layer flow transformer(339M) + Global-AdaLN으로 action 생성하는 **947M VLA**로, CALVIN ABC **4.53 SOTA**, 10개 벤치마크에서 평균 25.1% 향상, **200 H100 GPU-hours** (48h on 4 H100s)로 학습.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: Gemini Robotics
  Organization: Google DeepMind
  Date: 2025-03-12
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.20020
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Gemini 2.0 foundation model: VLA (end-to-end) + ER (embodied reasoning) + On-Device variants
    Backbone: Gemini 2.0 VLM
    LLM: Gemini 2.0
    Parameters: not disclosed (Gemini 2.0 scale)
  Tags: Gemini-2.0, cross-embodiment, end-to-end, embodied-reasoning, proprietary
  AI Review Summary: Google DeepMind의 Gemini 2.0 기반 대규모 VLA 모델 패밀리로, 범용 조작·open-vocabulary 지시 이해·few-shot 적응·cross-embodiment 일반화를 단일 모델에서 달성하며, embodied reasoning 특화 모델(Gemini Robotics-ER)을 함께 제안.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: GigaWorld-Policy
  Organization: GigaAI
  Date: 2026-03-18
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.17240
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: flow matching action decoder
    Backbone: Wan 2.2 Diffusion Transformer (5B)
    LLM: None
    Parameters: 5B
  Inference: 2.8 Hz
  Tags: world-action-model, flow-matching, video-DiT, efficient-inference
  Benchmarks:
    robotwin_v2 (avg=86.0): robotwin_v2_clean_avg=87.0, robotwin_v2_rand_avg=85.0
  Eval Conditions: {'robotwin_v2': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 기존 video-centered WAM의 추론 병목을 해결하기 위해 action 예측을 중심으로 비디오 생성을 조건부로 재구성하는 action-centered WAM을 제안하여, 기존 대비 9배 빠른 추론과 7% 높은 성공률 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: Goal2Skill
  Organization: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications / InspireOmni AI / Tsinghua University
  Date: 2026-04-15
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13942
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Discrete library of diffusion-based visuomotor primitives π_1..π_J (one per reusable skill). Reverse diffusion (Eq. 19: A^{m-1}_t = μ_θ(A^m_t, m, Î_t, s_t, ℓ_k) + σ_m·ε) conditioned on geometry-filtered observation Î_t = I_t ⊙ (1−Q_t), 14-dim proprioceptive state s_t, and sub-task instruction ℓ_k. Receding-horizon execution with checkpoint-based VLM verification.
    Backbone: zero-shot segmentation model S for distractor masking + temporal mask update K (specific identities not disclosed)
    LLM: single pre-trained VLM reused as Φ_plan / Φ_verify / Φ_reflect / Φ_mem (model identity not disclosed in paper)
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: long-horizon, planning, reflection, dual-system, diffusion, multi-skill, RMBench
  AI Review Summary: VLM 기반 high-level planner(메모리·검증·반성)와 diffusion VLA low-level executor를 **closed-loop**로 결합해 long-horizon manipulation에서 baseline 대비 3배 이상의 성공률 향상을 보인 dual-system 프레임워크.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: GR-Dexter
  Organization: ByteDance Seed
  Date: 2025-12-30
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.24210

  Venue: None

  Architecture:
    Action Head: VLM backbone + flow-matching action DiT for 56-DoF bimanual dexterous hands (ByteDexter V2)

    LLM: Qwen2.5 3B

  AI Review: Abstract-based

MODEL: GR-1
  Organization: ByteDance
  Date: 2023-12-20
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.13139

  Venue: ICLR 2024
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive (next-token prediction)
    Backbone: GPT-style Transformer
    LLM: Custom GPT (130M)
    Parameters: 130M
  Inference: 4 Hz
  Tags: 130M, autoregressive, video-prediction, manipulation, language-conditioned, open-source
  Benchmarks:

  Eval Conditions: {'calvin': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: 195M GPT-style transformer (46M trainable)를 Ego4D 800K 비디오 클립으로 video generation 사전학습한 후, CALVIN에서 **ABCD→D avg len 4.21** (HULC 3.06 대비 +37.6%), unseen scene zero-shot **85.4%** (기존 53.3% 대비 +60%) 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: HELM
  Organization: Tsinghua University / Alibaba Group / Bengbu University
  Date: 2026-04-20
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18791
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Wraps a frozen VLA backbone with three components: an Episodic Memory Module (CLIP ViT-B/32 keyframe store with top-k cosine retrieval), a learned State Verifier (3-layer MLP 1024->512->256->1 predicting pre-execution failure probability from memory-augmented observation, action, and subgoal), and a Harness Controller that triggers rollback or replanning when failure is predicted.
    Backbone: model-agnostic wrapper (evaluated with OpenVLA and Octo backbones, both kept frozen)
    LLM: inherited from underlying VLA backbone (OpenVLA / Octo)
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: wrapper, long-horizon, episodic-memory, failure-recovery, libero, calvin
  Benchmarks:
    libero: libero_long=81.5
    calvin (avg=3.58): calvin_abc_d_avg_len=3.58
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'wrapper-on-frozen-vla', 'calvin': 'wrapper-on-frozen-vla'}
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: HEX
  Organization: Beijing Innovation Center of Humanoid Robotics / Xi'an Jiaotong University / Nankai University / Peking University
  Date: 2026-04-09
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07993
  Code: https://hex-humanoid.github.io/
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: 16-layer DiT-B decoder (hidden size 1024) predicting 100-step action chunks, trained with flow-matching objective. Unified Proprioceptive Predictor (4-layer transformer, hidden 768, 50-step state horizon) with morphology-aware MoE (16 routed + 2 shared experts, top-1 routing) + adaptive residual-gated fusion of future predicted states with VL features.
    Backbone: Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct (vision encoder inside the VLM)
    LLM: Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct
    Parameters: 2.4B
  Inference: 13.6 Hz
  Tags: humanoid, whole-body, cross-embodiment, flow-matching, mixture-of-experts, real-world
  Eval Conditions: {'real_world': 'Tienkung 2.0/3.0 humanoids, 12-15 trials per task, 73.34ms latency on RTX 4090'}
  AI Review Summary: 부위별 독립 action prediction의 한계를 극복하기 위해, humanoid-aligned state 표현과 Mixture-of-Experts + flow-matching action generation을 결합한 **whole-body coordinated** VLA 프레임워크.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: HiMoE-VLA
  Organization: Tsinghua University / Shanghai AI Lab
  Date: 2025-12-05
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.05693
  Code: https://github.com/ZhiyingDu/HiMoE-VLA
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Hierarchical MoE action module with Action-Space MoE at boundary layers
    Backbone: PaliGemma (SigLIP + Gemma)
    LLM: Gemma 2B
    Parameters: 3B+
  Tags: 3B+, hierarchical-MoE, action-space-MoE, pi0-based, open-source

  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: HiVLA
  Organization: The University of Hong Kong / Shanghai AI Laboratory / Shanghai Jiao Tong University / CUHK
  Date: 2026-04-15
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.14125
  Code: https://tianshuoy.github.io/HiVLA-page/
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Conditional Flow Matching Diffusion Transformer (DiT) action expert (initialized from H-RDT, LLaMA-style backbone with RMSNorm + SwiGLU + AdaLN), with a cascaded cross-attention block that sequentially conditions noisy action latents on global image features, position-aware high-resolution local-crop features extracted via the planner's bounding box, and a language embedding for the subtask skill.
    Backbone: DINOv2 + SigLIP (vision encoder for the action expert)
    LLM: Qwen3-VL 8B (fine-tuned high-level VLM planner)
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: flow-matching, hierarchical, visual-grounding, robotwin, dual-system, bimanual
  Benchmarks:
    robotwin_v2 (avg=83.3): robotwin_v2_avg=83.3
  Eval Conditions: {'robotwin_v2': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  Code: https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/HY-Embodied
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Action Expert module following the structural design of pi0/pi0.5, attached to the HY-Embodied-0.5 MoT-2B base model and pre-trained on 5K hours of UMI data before per-task SFT.
    Backbone: HY-ViT 2.0 (400M, native-resolution Vision Transformer)
    LLM: HY-Embodied-0.5 MoT (2B activated / 4B total Mixture-of-Transformers; also a 32B activated / 407B total MoE-A32B variant)

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: KineVLA
  Organization: Gaoge Han et al.
  Date: 2026-03-22
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.17524
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: autoregressive with bi-level VQ action tokens (RVQ-VAE: goal codebook + kinematics codebook)
    Backbone: Prismatic-7B (OpenVLA base)
    LLM: Llama 2 7B
    Parameters: ~7B
  Inference: 10.4 Hz
  Tags: kinematics-aware, bi-level-VQ, RVQ-VAE, OpenVLA-based, LoRA, libero
  Benchmarks:
    libero: libero_goal_relabeled_kinematics=76.5, libero_kine_kinematics=70.4
  Eval Conditions: {'libero': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review Summary: OpenVLA 위에 bi-level RVQ-VAE (goal codebook + kinematics codebook)를 구축하여, goal-invariant 행동과 kinematics-variant 행동을 분리하고, kinematics-sensitive task에서 **76.5%** kinematics SR (baseline 35%) + 96ms inference 달성.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  AI Review: Abstract-based

  Organization: Declare Lab
  Date: 2025-04-28
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.19854
  Code: https://github.com/declare-lab/nora
  Venue: None
  Open Source: True
  Architecture:
    Action Head: FAST+ action tokenizer
    Backbone: Qwen2.5-VL
    LLM: Qwen2.5 3B
    Parameters: 3B

  AI Review Summary: Qwen-2.5-VL-3B + FAST+ tokenizer(+2048 tokens)로, 970K OXE demonstration에서 **4000 H100 GPU-hours** 학습하여, WidowX real-world **56.7%** (OpenVLA 40%), LIBERO-Long **74.6%** (NORA-Long), inference **8.3GB** GPU memory.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: ProGAL-VLA
  Organization: University of Illinois Chicago
  Date: 2026-04-10
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09824
  Code: https://nstrndrbi.github.io/ProGAL
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: imitation-learning regression head from OpenVLA-7B controller, conditioned on a verified goal embedding produced by State Alignment Cross Attention (SACA); trained with action MSE loss plus Grounding Alignment Contrastive (GAC) InfoNCE loss
    Backbone: OpenVLA-7B (fast policy pi_fast); Qwen-2.5-VL-Instruct-7B (slow planner pi_slow, asynchronous, once per episode); YOLO-World detector for open-vocabulary detections
    LLM: Qwen-2.5-VL-Instruct-7B (planner) and OpenVLA-7B internal LLM
    Parameters: ~7B (per-step controller; planner adds 7B but is invoked once per episode)
  Tags: grounding, hierarchical, dual-system, contrastive, ambiguity-detection, openvla, libero_plus
  Eval Conditions: {'libero_plus': 'fine-tuned'}
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: ReFineVLA
  Organization: VinRobotics / UT Arlington / IMPRS-IS Stuttgart / TU Darmstadt / TU Wien / AIT / MBZUAI
  Date: 2026-04-20
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17800
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: SpatialVLA-style action head augmented with a multimodal reasoning generation objective; jointly predicts actions and natural-language reasoning rationales (Observation / Situation Analysis / Spatial Reasoning / Task Planning) supervised by an expert teacher model
    Backbone: PaliGemma 2 VLM backbone (via SpatialVLA)
    LLM: PaliGemma 2 (Gemma LLM)
    Parameters: 3.5B
  Tags: reasoning, chain-of-thought, teacher-guided, fine-tuning, simpler_env, spatialvla, paligemma
  Benchmarks:
    simpler_env: widowx_put_spoon_on_towel_grasp=42.9, widowx_put_spoon_on_towel_success=38.1, widowx_put_carrot_on_plate_grasp=33.3, widowx_put_carrot_on_plate_success=33.3, widowx_stack_green_on_yellow_grasp=71.4, widowx_stack_green_on_yellow_success=23.8, widowx_put_eggplant_in_basket_grasp=100.0, widowx_put_eggplant_in_basket_success=95.2, widowx_average=47.7, google_robot_visual_matching_pick_coke_can=83.0, google_robot_visual_matching_move_near=95.3, google_robot_visual_matching_open_close_drawer=51.4, google_robot_visual_matching_average=76.6, google_robot_variant_aggregation_pick_coke_can=83.8, google_robot_variant_aggregation_move_near=88.1, google_robot_variant_aggregation_open_close_drawer=34.4, google_robot_variant_aggregation_average=68.8

MODEL: RoboDual
  Organization: Shanghai AI Lab (OpenDriveLab)
  Date: 2024-10-10
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.08001
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: dual-system: OpenVLA 7B generalist + 20M Diffusion Transformer specialist via cross-attention
    Backbone: PrismaticVLM (SigLIP + DinoV2)
    LLM: Llama-2 7B
    Parameters: 7B + 20M
  Tags: 7B+20M, dual-system, diffusion-transformer, cross-attention
  AI Review Summary: VLA-based generalist (System 2)와 diffusion-transformer specialist (System 1)를 20M 학습 가능 파라미터로 결합하여, real-world 26.7% 향상과 CALVIN 12% 향상을 3.8x 높은 제어 주파수에서 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

MODEL: SAMoE-VLA
  Organization: Tsinghua University (AIR) / Southeast University / HUST / USTC / USTB
  Date: 2026-03-09
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08113
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Flow matching-based planning expert structured as Mixture-of-Experts (SA-MoE) layers replacing FFN at every fourth Transformer layer; routed by a Deformable Scene Encoder using BEV features; unified with World-Language Expert via Conditional Cross-Modal Causal Attention (CMCA); 10 ODE steps at inference
    Backbone: OpenCLIP-ConvNext image encoder + CPFPN multi-scale features + BEVFormer BEV encoder (256-dim, 200x200 spatial); World-Language Expert built on a pretrained large world-VLM
    LLM: InternVL2-2B (planning expert initialization)
    Parameters: 3.6B (total)
  Tags: autonomous-driving, mixture-of-experts, flow-matching, BEV, nuscenes, langauto, internvl2
  Eval Conditions: {'nuscenes': "open-loop planning (not in VLA-Tracker's standard benchmark set)", 'langauto': "closed-loop CARLA (not in VLA-Tracker's standard benchmark set)"}
  AI Review Summary: 자율주행에 VLA를 적용하여, BEV feature 기반 scene-adaptive MoE routing과 Conditional Cross-Modal Causal Attention으로 nuScenes 및 LangAuto SOTA 달성.
  AI Review: Abstract-based

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: StableIDM
  Organization: GigaAI / Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences / Beijing Institute of Technology
  Date: 2026-04-20
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17887
  Code: None
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: History-conditioned IDM f_θ over a fixed-length causal sliding window. Per-frame base MLP regressor h(z_t) + causal TCN with dilation factors {1,2,4,8} for residual correction (Directional Feature Aggregation + Temporal Dynamics Refinement). Outputs continuous dual-arm joint angles + gripper opening, normalized via per-dimension training statistics (μ_train, σ_train) at inference.
    Backbone: DINOv2 (Oquab et al. 2023) as visual encoder + Segment Anything (Kirillov et al. 2023) for robot-centric masking
    LLM: None
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: inverse-dynamics, manipulator-truncation, spatio-temporal, robustness, data-annotation, AgiBot, real-world
  AI Review Summary: **manipulator truncation** (로봇 팔이 시야에서 잘림) 상황에서 IDM이 붕괴하는 문제를, **robot-centric masking + Directional Feature Aggregation (DFA) + Temporal Dynamics Refinement (TDR)** 의 **공간-시간 정제**로 안정화.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

------------------------------------------------------------
MODEL: UniT
  Organization: XPeng Robotics / Tsinghua University / The University of Hong Kong
  Date: 2026-04-21
  Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19734
  Code: https://xpeng-robotics.github.io/unit/
  Venue: None
  Open Source: False
  Architecture:
    Action Head: Hybrid two-stage. (1) UniT Token Prediction: learnable queries q_t appended to the VLM sequence; VLM predicts discrete UniT codes c_t = UniT(o_t, o_{t+k}, a_{t:t+k}, s_t) via parallel cross-entropy classification (not causal next-token AR). (2) Flow-Matching action head V_θ on action chunks A_t = [a_t,...,a_{t+H-1}], τ ∈ U[0,1], interpolated path A^τ_t = τA_t + (1−τ)ε; trained with L_fm = E[||V_θ(A^τ_t | x_t, Enc(o_t), τ) − (A_t − ε)||²]. Total: L_VLA = L_token + λ_fm·L_fm.
    Backbone: frozen DINOv2 (visual branch acts as inverse-dynamics model anchor)
    LLM: Qwen2.5-VL (used as VL backbone within the GR00T n1.5 framework)
    Parameters: TODO
  Tags: latent-action, cross-embodiment, humanoid, human-video, world-model, hybrid, flow-matching
  Benchmarks:
    robocasa (avg=66.0): robocasa_gr1_pick_place=67.3, robocasa_gr1_articulated=64.7
  Eval Conditions: {'robocasa': 'Full training data (24×1000 trajs); VLA-UniT (Qwen2.5-VL)'}
  AI Review Summary: Human egocentric video와 humanoid action을 "visual consequence"를 공통 anchor로 삼아 **embodiment-agnostic discrete latent space**로 통합하는, tri-branch cross-reconstruction 기반의 통합 physical language tokenizer.
  AI Review: PDF-verified

  AI Review: PDF-verified

================================================================================
SECTION 3: BENCHMARK DEFINITIONS
================================================================================

LIBERO: 4 manipulation suites (Spatial, Object, Goal, Long-horizon)
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.
  Primary ranking metric for VLA-Tracker.

CALVIN: Long-horizon language-conditioned manipulation (ABC→D setting)
  Score: Average number of tasks completed in sequence (0-5). Higher is better.

SimplerEnv: Sim-to-real transfer evaluation
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

RoboTwin v1/v2: Bimanual dual-arm manipulation (50+ tasks)
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

RLBench: Diverse manipulation tasks (18 tasks)
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

RoboCasa: Home robot manipulation tasks
  Score range: 0-100% success rate. Higher is better.

================================================================================
END OF FILE
Total: 112 models, 53 with LIBERO scores
================================================================================
